project.name: Drone VLA Training
project.goal: Train a Vision-Language-Action model to take drone commands and find objects

drone.control: RC controller (2.4GHz radio, not capturable via WiFi)

network.note: Drone creates its own WiFi hotspot, no internet when connected

protocol.camera_library: pylwdrone (pip install pylwdrone) — handles Lewei camera module protocol
protocol.note: TCP 7060 and 8060 confirmed open. Drone uses Lewei (LW) camera module, same as all com.lwcx apps.

status.wifi_connection: confirmed — Mac connects to drone WiFi at 192.168.0.1
status.flight_control: untested — need to verify command protocol
next_steps: Build VLA data pipeline: paired video frames + control commands
Integrate camera + controller into single training data collector
